ddls:
CREATE TABLE "moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "movelist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move list the move belongs to */,
  "command" TEXT /* Input command for the move */,
  "hit_height" TEXT /* Height of the move (e.g., HIGH, MID, LOW) */,
  "start_frame" INTEGER /* Start frame of the move */,
  "block_frame" INTEGER /* Block frame of the move */,
  "hit_frame" INTEGER /* Hit frame of the move */,
  "damage" INTEGER /* Damage dealt by the move */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video demonstrating the move */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image illustrating the move */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the move */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the move was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the move was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or last updated the move */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the move (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_movelist_id FOREIGN KEY ("movelist_id") REFERENCES movelists ("movelist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movelists" (
  "movelist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move list */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the move list belongs to */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character the move list belongs to */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the move list was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the move list was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or last updated the move list */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movelist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movelists_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movelists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform(s) on which the game is available */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, moderator, contributor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "activated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is activated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the move */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the move as a favorite */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move marked as a favorite */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the move was marked as a favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move the discussion is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the discussion */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the discussion */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the discussion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discussion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discussion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion the reply is part of */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the reply */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the reply */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reply was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reply was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id")
)
